data.title: AI-Generated Music Fraud Case Uncovered in North Carolina
data.description: Between 2017 and 2024, Michael Smith from North Carolina orchestrated a large-scale music streaming fraud using AI technology. According to Ming Pao, Smith generated hundreds of thousands of songs with AI and managed approximately 1,040 cloud service accounts at the peak of his operation. Each account hosted 20 bots, totaling around 20,800 bot accounts. These bots, disguised as real listeners through VPNs, continuously streamed his AI-generated music around the clock. This scheme resulted in a daily peak of about 660,000 plays, allowing Smith to fraudulently collect over $8 million in royalties from platforms like Spotify and Apple Music. This case is considered the first criminal incident of AI-assisted music streaming fraud in the United States and possibly the world.

data.title: Stablecoin Payments Attract Venture Capital Amid Crypto Investment Slowdown
data.description: Investment in the cryptocurrency sector has seen a decline following the Web3 and NFTs excitement of the early 2020s. Bloomberg posted on X, however, that one segment continues to draw significant interest from venture capitalists: stablecoin payments. This area of the market is gaining attention as investors seek opportunities within the evolving digital currency landscape. Despite the overall cooling of crypto investments, stablecoin payments present a promising avenue for growth and innovation.

data.title: Judge Allows Multi-Color to Access Remaining Chapter 11 Loan
data.description: A federal judge has permitted label-maker Multi-Color to access the remaining portion of its $250 million Chapter 11 loan. Bloomberg posted on X, however, the judge refrained from approving a disputed aspect of the financing that would prioritize some existing debt in the repayment hierarchy. This decision comes as Multi-Color navigates its financial restructuring under Chapter 11 bankruptcy proceedings.

data.title: ARK Invest Utilizes Kalshi Prediction Market Data for Investment Strategies
data.description: ARK Invest announced on Thursday its integration of Kalshi prediction market data into its investment strategies. According to NS3.AI, ARK is leveraging this data in three primary ways: updating expectations, analyzing trading-volume indicators, and managing event-specific risks. Kalshi, which was valued at $22 billion following a strategic funding round last week, provides ARK with valuable insights to inform investment decisions and hedge against potential risks.

data.title: U.S. Defense Department Deploys Unmanned Speedboats in Operations Against Iran
data.description: The U.S. Defense Department has announced the deployment of unmanned speedboats for patrol operations targeting Iran. According to Jin10, these vessels are part of a strategic initiative to enhance surveillance and security measures in the region. The deployment underscores the ongoing tensions between the United States and Iran, as both nations continue to navigate complex geopolitical dynamics. The use of unmanned technology reflects a broader trend in military operations, emphasizing efficiency and reduced risk to personnel. This development is likely to impact regional security and diplomatic relations, as the U.S. seeks to assert its presence and address perceived threats from Iran.

data.title: Atlas Scout Program Lunch and Learn Event at Columbia University
data.description: A lunch and learn event about the Atlas Scout Program is set to take place at Columbia University. YZi Labs posted on X. The session will cover details about the program, including its objectives, the type of participants they are seeking, and how to get involved. The event is particularly aimed at students interested in supporting the next generation of Web3, AI, and biotech entrepreneurs.

data.title: Apple Offers Bonuses to Retain iPhone Designers Amid AI Startup Competition
data.description: Apple has recently awarded rare bonuses to its iPhone hardware designers in an effort to prevent them from leaving for AI startups. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that companies like OpenAI are attracting talent as they develop their own devices. This move by Apple underscores the increasing competition for skilled professionals in the tech industry, particularly as AI continues to grow in prominence. The bonuses are part of Apple's strategy to retain key personnel and maintain its competitive edge in the rapidly evolving technology landscape.

data.title: Felix Protocol Launches Tokenized U.S. Stocks and ETFs on HyperEVM
data.description: Felix Protocol has introduced tokenized U.S. stocks and ETFs on the HyperEVM platform, expanding trading opportunities for investors. According to NS3.AI, this launch allows traders to access over 250 tokenized U.S. equities through a collaboration with Ondo Finance. Felix Protocol stated that users can execute orders up to $1 million with net execution costs under 10 basis points. However, this service is not accessible to users in the U.S. or other restricted regions.

data.title: UK Government Trials Social Media Restrictions for Teenagers
data.description: The UK government announced on March 25 that it will initiate a pilot program to test measures restricting social media use among teenagers. According to Jin10, around 300 teenagers aged 13 to 17 will participate in a six-week trial. Participants will be divided into groups to experience different restrictions: a complete ban on social media use, a ban from 9 PM to 7 AM, or a limit of one hour of social media use per day. A control group will maintain unrestricted social media access. The trial aims to observe the impact of these measures on teenagers' sleep quality, academic performance, and family relationships.

data.title: BitMine Immersion Technologies Stock Lags Despite Ethereum Holdings
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) stock is trading near $21.24, trailing behind Ethereum despite holding a treasury of 4,660,903 ETH. According to NS3.AI, technical analysis indicates that BMNR has been in a six-month descending channel, experiencing a 68% decline from above $65 to the current $21 area.

data.title: St. Cloud Financial Credit Union's Digital Asset Vault Holds Over 12.6 BTC
data.description: St. Cloud Financial Credit Union has announced that its CU-Digital Asset Vault now holds over 12.6 Bitcoin (BTC) for its members. According to NS3.AI, this development comes just weeks after the launch of the custody pilot. The service also manages smaller quantities of Ether (ETH) and USD Coin (USDC), and is currently available exclusively to the credit union's more than 28,000 members.

data.title: Foreign Central Banks Reduce Holdings of U.S. Treasury Bonds by $23.177 Billion
data.description: Foreign central banks have decreased their holdings of U.S. Treasury bonds by $23.177 billion for the week ending March 27, according to Jin10. This marks a significant reduction compared to the previous week's decrease of $9.254 billion. The shift in foreign central banks' investment strategies may reflect broader economic trends and concerns about U.S. fiscal policies. Analysts are closely monitoring these changes as they could impact global financial markets and investor sentiment.

data.title: Paramount's Acquisition of Warner Bros. Signals Shift in Hollywood
data.description:
Paramount's recent acquisition of Warner Bros. marks a significant development in the entertainment industry. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the discussion on the Big Take podcast featuring Lucas Shaw, Chris Palmeri, and Sarah Holder. The conversation delved into the implications of this merger for Hollywood's future.

The acquisition is expected to reshape the competitive landscape, as Paramount gains access to Warner Bros.' extensive library and production capabilities. This move could lead to increased content offerings and strategic advantages in the streaming wars.

Industry experts suggest that this merger may prompt further consolidation within the sector, as companies strive to enhance their market positions. The deal underscores the growing importance of content ownership and distribution in the evolving media environment.

As the entertainment industry continues to adapt to changing consumer preferences and technological advancements, Paramount's strategic acquisition of Warner Bros. is poised to influence the direction of Hollywood in the coming years.

data.title: Strategy's Stretch Preferred Shares: Retail Investors Hold 80% Stake
data.description: Retail investors currently hold approximately 80% of Strategy's Stretch perpetual preferred shares, which serve as the company's primary funding mechanism for its regular Bitcoin acquisitions. According to NS3.AI, Strategy has utilized Stretch to purchase nearly $3 billion worth of Bitcoin this year.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Prices Surge as Trump Pauses Iran Energy Facility Destruction Deadline
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced on social media that, at the request of the Iranian government, the deadline for the destruction of Iran's energy facilities has been postponed by 10 days, now set for April 6, 2026, at 8 PM Eastern Time. According to Jin10, negotiations are ongoing, and despite contrary reports from some media outlets, Trump stated that the talks are progressing smoothly. Following this announcement, spot gold prices surged by over $60 in a short period, while WTI crude oil prices dropped nearly $5. Additionally, U.S. stock index futures experienced a rapid increase.

data.title: Justin Sun Unveils AI System to Combat Cryptocurrency Fraud
data.description: Justin Sun announced the development of an AI system designed to identify suspects in cryptocurrency fraud cases. According to NS3.AI, Sun plans to allocate $100 million in rewards for information leading to successful identification and prosecution of fraudsters. The system has already analyzed criminal cases involving over $1 billion. A dedicated website has been launched to accept tips related to fraud, aiming to enhance the effectiveness of the initiative.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 630 USDT with a Narrowed 2.25% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 26, 2026, 20:12 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 630 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 630.330017 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.25% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Extends Deadline for Iran Energy Facility Destruction
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has announced a 10-day extension on the deadline for the destruction of Iran's energy facilities. According to Jin10, the new deadline is set for 8 p.m. Eastern Time on Monday, April 6, 2026. This decision comes amid ongoing tensions between the United States and Iran, with the extension providing additional time for diplomatic efforts or strategic planning. The move reflects the complex geopolitical dynamics at play, as both nations navigate their respective interests and international pressures.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Negotiations Progressing Smoothly
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that ongoing negotiations are progressing very smoothly. According to Jin10, the President did not specify the nature of the negotiations or the parties involved. This statement comes amid various international discussions and diplomatic efforts that the U.S. is currently engaged in. The President's remarks suggest a positive outlook on the outcomes of these negotiations, although further details remain undisclosed.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Delays Strike on Iranian Energy Facilities, Oil Prices Drop
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has once again announced a delay in the planned strike on Iranian energy facilities. According to Jin10, this decision has led to a short-term decline in oil prices, while gold prices have surged. The postponement of military action against Iran has created fluctuations in the commodities market, reflecting investor reactions to geopolitical tensions. The delay in the strike comes amid ongoing discussions and strategic considerations regarding the situation in the Middle East. Market analysts are closely monitoring the developments, as the potential for conflict could significantly impact global oil supply and prices. Meanwhile, the rise in gold prices indicates a shift towards safe-haven assets as investors seek stability amid uncertainty. The situation remains fluid, with market participants awaiting further announcements from the U.S. administration.
